title: UK’s leading battery developers to meet in Leicester
snippet:
Innovators and developers of battery systems to share ideas at major event

The post UK’s leading battery developers to meet in Leicester appeared first on
ai_summary: UK battery developers convening to discuss innovation in battery systems. Relevant as battery storage is part of the broader renewable energy and flexible generation landscape.
ai_reasoning: Battery storage is tangentially related to tem's flex and trading operations, and the renewable energy transition broadly. Worth monitoring as background context on storage technology trends, but no immediate business impact.
